name: Yao

skills.name: Gift of the Stars
skills.description: Recovers Health when landing skill hits. Using any 3 skills enhances his next skill, and using the enhanced skill will enhance his next Basic Attack.

skills.name: Star Rush
skills.description: Moves quickly, dealing damage and slowing enemies in his path.

skills.name: Return to Dust
skills.description:
Returns to his location 2s ago, removes Star Reduction, and deals damage to enemies in his path.
Passive: Some of his damage taken is converted into Star Reduction after a short delay.

skillsZh.name: 星辰之賜
skillsZh.description: 曜技能命中目標時獲得回復，每三次施放技能會獲得強化技能使用權，使用強化技能後，強化下次普攻。

skillsZh.name: 裂空斬
skillsZh.description: 曜旋轉劍刃，對周圍敵人造成傷害。

skillsZh.name: 逐星
skillsZh.description: 曜發起位移，對路徑上的敵人造成傷害和減速。

skillsZh.name: 歸塵
skillsZh.description:
曜回到2秒前位置，清除星屑並對路徑上的敵人造成傷害。
被動：曜所受傷害轉為星屑延遲結算。

tips: Build: Cuirass of Savagery, Overlord's Might, Sage's Sanctuary.
tipsZh: 曜（打野）：梯度 B，勝率 51.43%（Camp HOK）。
出裝：暴烈之甲、強者破軍、賢者的庇護.

patchHistory.change: Increased base Physical Defense and reduced the cooldown of Skill 2.
patchHistory.detail: Increased base Physical Defense and reduced the cooldown of Skill 2.

patchHistory.change: Increased base stats and Skill 1 damage
patchHistory.detail: While Yao's combat style relies on him being able to freely move in and out of battle, his current stats don't really enable him to do this well. So, we increased them to allow him greater freedom to enter and exit fights.

patchHistoryZh.change: 提高基礎物理防禦，縮減二技能冷卻時間
patchHistoryZh.detail: 提高基礎物理防禦，縮減二技能冷卻時間

patchHistoryZh.change: 提高基礎屬性和一技能傷害
patchHistoryZh.detail: 曜目前的屬性無法支撐他進退自如的戰鬥風格，因此我們提高他的屬性讓他更有信心切入和退場。

faqs.question: Is Yao good in current season?
faqs.answer: Yao is Tier B Assassin with 51.43% win rate, 0.56% pick rate, and 0.04% ban rate (Camp HOK international).

faqs.question: What is the best Yao build?
faqs.answer: Recommended: Cuirass of Savagery, Overlord's Might, Sage's Sanctuary, Destiny, Succubus Cloak, Starbreaker.

faqs.question: How to counter Yao?
faqs.answer: Pick Hou Yi, Daji, Angela. Strong into Angela, Mi Yue, Ziya.

faqsZh.question: 曜 這版本適合上分嗎？
faqsZh.answer: 曜 為 B 梯度，勝率 51.43%、選取 0.56%、禁用 0.04%（Camp HOK 國際服）。

faqsZh.question: 曜 出裝怎麼搭配？
faqsZh.answer: 推薦：暴烈之甲、強者破軍、賢者的庇護、名刀・司命、魔女斗篷、碎星錘.

faqsZh.question: 怎麼克制 曜？
faqsZh.answer: 可選 Hou Yi、Daji、Angela。曜 克制 Angela、Mi Yue、Ziya。

metaAnalysis: Counters: Angela, Mi Yue, Ziya. Weak into: Hou Yi, Daji, Angela.

guide.overview: Yao is a Medium Assassin (Jungling) on Honor of Kings Global. Camp HOK ranks them Tier B with 51.4% win rate and 0.5% pick rate as of 2026-06-05.
guide.hook: Yao: Recovers Health when landing skill hits.
guide.bestBuild: Rush Rapacious Bite, Boots of Resistance, Axe of Torment, then complete Spikemail, Starbreaker. Use preset tabs for jungle, clash, or CN-style paths when draft requires it.
guide.arcanaSpells: Run Mutation for stats that match Yao's Assassin kit. Take Smite — swap to Purify against heavy CC or Smite when jungling.
guide.combo: Standard trade: Starlight Slice → Starburn (Yao) → Return to Dust → weave basic attacks. Weave basic attacks between skill casts for passive value.

skillOrder.priority: Skill 2 → Skill 1 → Return to Dust (max Skill 2 first)
skillOrder.reason: Starburn (Yao) provides mobility or stick—max first. Starlight Slice second for damage. Return to Dust on every level.

combos.name: Standard trade
combos.steps: Starlight Slice → Starburn (Yao) → Return to Dust → weave basic attacks

combos.name: All-in
combos.steps: Return to Dust after full rotation when Flash is down
combos.when: Gank or backline dive with team CC

arcanaRows.effect: Adjust Purify/Execute based on enemy dive.

guide.laning: Clear to level four, then gank the lane with the least escape. Secure Tyrant when your bot or mid has crash wave.
guide.teamfight: Wait for CC from your team, then dive carry with full combo. Exit with reset or flash if focus fired.
guide.highRank: Yao sits at Tier B globally (51.4% WR). In high rank, pick only into favorable matchups or when you have a dedicated pocket pick.
comparisons: Yao vs Wukong (Assassin, Tier S): Wukong is 1.3% pick / 49.7% WR. Yao has +1.7% WR vs Wukong in Camp data. Choose Yao when you need Jungling identity; choose Wukong for Jungling comfort.
Yao vs Musashi (Assassin, Tier A): Musashi is 1.1% pick / 50.7% WR. Yao has +0.7% WR vs Musashi in Camp data. Choose Yao when you need Jungling identity; choose Musashi for Jungling comfort.

matchups.summary: Yao excels into Angela, Mi Yue, Ziya. Avoid blind picking into Hou Yi, Daji, Angela without team peel.
